  1. recoder.service

Uses of Package
recoder.service

Packages that use recoder.service
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.bytecode
This package contains classes that cover information derived from Java byte code.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
  • Classes in recoder.service used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    Class
    Description
    ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult
    Carrier for intermediate evaluation results.
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
  • Classes in recoder.service used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
    Class
    Description
    ChangeHistoryListener
    Model change listener interface.
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
    DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Implements queries for cross referencing.
    DefaultNameInfo
     
    DefaultProgramModelInfo
     
    DefaultSourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
    KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
     
    NameInfo
    Manages the global name mapping.
    ProgramModelInfo
    The program model info computes predicates for program model elements contained in recoder.abstraction.
    SourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
  • Classes in recoder.service used by de.uka.ilkd.key.util
    Class
    Description
    ErrorHandler
    An error handler that receives exceptions from services, reports them to the user and may react upon them.
    ModelUpdateListener
    Model change listener interface.

    Class
    Description
    ByteCodeInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with bytecode representations.
    ChangeHistory
    Keeps records on the syntactical changes that occured after the last validation of the model.
    ConstantEvaluator
    Constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
    ImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitly defined program model elements.

    Manages the global name mapping.
    SourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.

    An atomic change of a syntax tree represented by the root of the corresponding subtree.
